Currently Building
Kinetic UIActive

Bespoke motion components for React — production-ready primitives built on Framer Motion.

About

I build security libraries, language tooling, and automation systems. I care about how software works under the hood — from biometric authentication algorithms to DSL interpreters and browser-native privacy tools. These days I'm deep into AI integration and developer tooling, and shipping Kinetic UI — bespoke motion components for React. Always down to ship something useful.
